title: Paul Anthony Travel Pro Battery Operated Men's Compact Foil Shaver/Titanium Steel Flexible Blade/Retractable Side Foil Flexible Trimmer/Rubberised Finish / 2 x AA Battery Operated - H5001
availability_text: Only 14 left in stock (more on the way).
features: THE PERFECT TRAVEL AND CAMPING COMPANION: Battery operated compact design, perfect for on the go with no electrical socket required. Simply insert your batteries and you’re good to go!
TITANIUM STEEL FLEXIBLE BLADE WITH FOIL HEAD: The blades oscillate rapidly to cut away at facial hair, giving a clean, smooth shave whilst the foil head protects the skin.
RETRACTABLE SIDE FOIL FLEXIBLE TRIMMER: Trim and style styling with a built-in trimmer for sideburns, moustache and beards that can be released when needed.

EASY MAINTENANCE AND CARE: This appliance has been designed to operate over a long period of time with minimum maintenance. This shaver comes with removable components, allowing for a more thorough and detailed clean.
BATTERY POWERED: No need for chargers and electrical sockets, this compact foil shaver runs requires 2 AA batteries (not included) perfect for travelling and camping.
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony Travel Pro battery operated mens compact foil shaver is a great companion when travelling or camping. It has twin titanium floating blades, providing a clean smooth shave, whilst the foil head protects the skin. This shaver also features a retractable side foil flexible trimmer that can be released when needed and pushed back in when not in use.The shaver requires 2 AA batteries (not included) meaning there is no need for an electrical socket or to carry chargers with you. With it’s compact design and rubberised finish it is perfect for your weekend bag or suitcase. Box Includes:Paul Anthony Travel Pro Battery Operated Mens Compact Shaver. Safety Warning General safety warnings applicable to electric shavers
